cubes.title: Fix Leaks Fast
cubes.rationale: Fixing a leaking faucet can save water and money. A leaky faucet can waste up to 20 gallons of water per day. This guide provides step-by-step instructions to fix a leaking faucet.

rules.rule: WARNING: avoid scalding from hot water
PROHIBITED: use pliers on faucet handles
WARNING: beware of sharp edges on pipes
MUST remove old O-ring or gasket
MUST apply plumber's grease to new O-ring
MUST check for leaks after repair

cubes.title: Unclog Sink
cubes.rationale: Unclogging a kitchen sink drain can save time and money by avoiding professional plumbing services. It also helps to prevent water damage and reduces the risk of health hazards. Regular maintenance can prevent future clogs.

rules.rule: MUST use plunger to loosen clog
WARNING: avoid using drain snakes excessively
WARNING: be cautious with hot water

cubes.title: Fix Drywall
cubes.rationale: Patching drywall holes perfectly is crucial for a smooth finish and to prevent further damage. A well-patched drywall hole can save time and money in the long run. With the right techniques, anyone can achieve professional-looking results.

rules.rule: PROHIBITED use of wrong joint compound
MUST apply thin joint compound layer
MUST press patch firmly into place
MUST inspect patch for air bubbles

rules.rule: WARNING: Avoid bleach for discoloration risk

cubes.title: Stain Free

This cube provides a set of rules to help users remove carpet stains effectively. By following these rules, users can save time and effort, and enjoy a stain-free carpet.

rules.rule: MUST use cold water for blood stains
PROHIBITED using hot water for protein stains

cubes.title: Safe Tire Change
cubes.rationale: Changing a car tire on the roadside can be dangerous if not done properly. Following safety rules can prevent injuries and accidents. This cube provides essential guidelines for a safe tire change.

rules.rule: WARNING loose clothing can get caught
WARNING oncoming traffic can be deadly
MUST use tire iron to loosen lug nuts
WARNING changing tire on slope is hazardous
MUST check tire pressure after change
MUST drive carefully after tire change

cubes.title: Jump-Start Car
cubes.rationale: Jump-starting a car with a dead battery can get you back on the road quickly. It's a valuable skill to have in emergency situations. With the right steps, you can do it safely and effectively.

rules.rule: WARNING: Avoid touching cables to body
WARNING: Never touch battery terminals to eyes
PROHIBITED: Use damaged or frayed cables
WARNING: Keep children away from process
MUST remove cables in reverse order

rules.rule: PROHIBITED touching wiper blades with bare hands

cubes.title: Save Lives
cubes.rationale: Knowing how to perform CPR correctly can significantly increase a person's chances of survival during cardiac arrest. Proper technique is crucial to ensure effective blood circulation and breathing. By following these rules, you can help save lives.

rules.rule: WARNING: never perform CPR without training
PROHIBITED: do not press too hard on chest
WARNING: be aware of potential neck injuries

MUST continue until medical help arrives
PROHIBITED: do not stop compressions unnecessarily
WARNING: be cautious of automated defibrillators
